ip_outcome_note: Card name matches character. Bunny-suit disguise with pacifier is Finnick's signature visual identifier from Zootopia's opening con sequence — not shared by any other Disney character. Official Zootopia franchise classification confirmed via LorcanaPlayer.com and Lorcana databases.

trivia_bullets.text: Finnick is Nick Wilde's con partner in Zootopia (2016). His signature grift: disguise as Nick's toddler 'son' (bunny suit variant shown on this card) while Nick runs a scam. Deep gravelly voice contrasting his baby-faced fennec appearance is his recurring comedic payoff. Voiced by the late Tommy 'Tiny' Lister.
sources: IMDb: Zootopia — Tom Lister Jr. as Finnick

trivia_bullets.text: The depicted bunny suit with pink bow and pacifier is the specific costume from Finnick's most plot-critical con sequence — visually unambiguous as Finnick's identifier.

Cost 1, Strength 1, Willpower 2, Emerald Common. YOU BETTER RUN bounces opposing character with 2 or less strength for 2 additional ink (total 3 to bounce). Early board presence at 1 cost; bounce used opportunistically against opposing 1-cost characters.
Positioned in Whispers in the Well as a Storyborn Ally type, consistent with Finnick's supporting role in Zootopia's narrative.

related_cards.name: Nick Wilde
related_cards.note: Finnick's con partner in source film; likely paired in Emerald builds
